cards.name: Barad Ungol
cards.quote: Barad Ungol keeps a dark and sinking quiet, and few cross it without care.

cards.name: The Eye Watches
cards.quote: In the shadow of Barad-dûr, fear takes root and courage falters.
cards.actionEffect: Allied units in radius 1 gain Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn); enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Reach of Barad-Ungol
cards.quote: Darkness looms where the Eye's gaze can reach, chilling the hearts of the brave.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn) and Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Eye's Tribute
cards.quote: All must bow to the will of the Dark Lord, or face his wrath.
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Chains of the Lidless Eye
cards.quote: Bound by the unseen chains, his minions rise to do his bidding.
cards.actionEffect: All Nazgul gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Murazor
cards.quote: In service to Sauron, I am his shadow and his sword.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Akhorahil
cards.quote: The whispers of darkness guide my hand; I shall not fail.
cards.actionEffect: Apply ArcaneInsight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Ji Indur
cards.quote: In the shadows, power waits; I will claim it for my master.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: Adunaphel
cards.quote: The night is long, and I am its harbinger.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Ren the Unclean
cards.quote: To serve the Eye is to embrace the filth of the world.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 15 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Hoarmurath
cards.quote: From the depths, I draw forth the darkness that shall consume you.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Dendra Dwar
cards.quote: Wielding dread like a sword, I am the bane of my enemies.
cards.actionEffect: Restore full movement <sprite name="movement"> to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Shelob
cards.quote: In my web, all creatures will meet their end.
cards.actionEffect: Conceal a random controlled settlement from enemies for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: Durthang Orcs
cards.quote: Marching forth, the dark tide swells, hungry for plunder.

cards.name: Durthang Sorcerers
cards.quote: With shadows as our allies, we weave spells to doom our foes.

cards.name: Gorgoroth Militia
cards.quote: Rally to the call of the Eye; we fight for the dark lord.

cards.name: Ungol Orcs
cards.quote: From the depths, we arise, relentless and unyielding.

cards.name: Udun
cards.quote: A realm of shadow and sorrow, where dread whispers in the dark.

cards.name: Gorgoroth
cards.quote: A desolate wasteland, echoing with the cries of the damned.

cards.name: Nurn
cards.quote: The air hangs heavy with the scent of toil and the whispers of forgotten lives.

cards.name: Ungol
cards.quote: In the shadow of the mountain, the darkness stirs with ancient malice.

cards.name: Ithilien
cards.quote: Once a realm of beauty, now a haunted echo of what was lost.

cards.name: Gothmog
cards.quote: I am the darkness that consumes all hope.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 15 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Gorthog
cards.quote: The strength of iron and the fury of wrath shall be my legacy.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 ma <sprite name="ma"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Mouth of Sauron
cards.quote: I speak for the Dark Lord; his will shall be done.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 25 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: BaradWath
cards.quote: BaradWath stands like a dark sentinel over the waste, its shadow long with command.

cards.name: Carach Angren
cards.quote: Carach Angren lies under a cruel name, and the stones there have not forgiven.

cards.name: CirithUngol
cards.quote: CirithUngol is a soft place, and its softness is the first of its deceits.

cards.name: DeadMarshes
cards.quote: The reeds about DeadMarshes whisper like witnesses who would rather not be named.

cards.name: Durthang
cards.quote: Durthang clings to the Emyn Muil with a grim old patience, and its black height still dares the sky.

cards.name: Kal Nargil
cards.quote: Kal Nargil grips the hills in black silence, where no bird lingers long.

cards.name: LagScara
cards.quote: LagScara lies under a restless sky, and the stillness there feels earned by threat.

cards.name: LagVrasfotak
cards.quote: LagVrasfotak watches from a barren reach, half-fortress and half-buried warning.

cards.name: Luglurak
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches beneath the old shadow, waiting with the patience of iron.

cards.name: Minas Morgul
cards.quote: Minas Morgul burns with a pale malice, and the road to it seems to remember fear.

cards.name: Morannon
cards.quote: Morannon stands unyielding, a gate that has learned to answer only to ruin.

cards.name: Nurumurl
cards.quote: Nurumurl stands in a country that has taught itself to endure by never sleeping.

cards.name: Olbamarl
cards.quote: Olbamarl keeps its old hush by the water, and the reeds there seem to remember names.

cards.name: OrdugaAivaisa
cards.quote: OrdugaAivaisa feels like a watch-post left standing after the rest of a kingdom was taken away.

cards.name: Ostigurth
cards.quote: Ostigurth keeps its secrets in the stone, where even echoes seem cautious.

cards.name: Rul
cards.quote: Rul sits like a watchfire long gone cold, but the ground around it still knows watchfulness.

cards.name: Shelob's Lair
cards.quote: Shelob's Lair breathes with old malice, and even the stone seems to shy from the dark within it.

cards.name: Thuringwathost
cards.quote: Thuringwathost bears the mark of old terror, and the land around it has not forgotten the touch.

cards.name: UrlurtsuNurn
cards.quote: UrlurtsuNurn endures in the heat with a rough and stubborn silence, like a camp that refused to die.

cards.name: Morgul Pass Guards
cards.quote: Silent sentinels of shadow, ever watchful and unyielding.

cards.name: Olog Hai
cards.quote: Brutality incarnate, they charge with the wrath of a mountain's fall.

cards.name: Spawns of Ungoliant
cards.quote: Born from shadow and hunger, we know no fear.

cards.name: War Trolls
cards.quote: Foul beasts of war, they trample all beneath their monstrous feet.

cards.name: Wargs
cards.quote: Speed and hunger drive them, a dark storm of fangs and fury.

cards.name: The Dark Eye
cards.quote: Nothing moves in shadow that I do not see. The darkness between the stars is mine to read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: FiresOfDoom
cards.quote: Let the flames of despair engulf the land, igniting fear in every heart.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: apply Burning <sprite name="burning"> (1 turn) to all enemy units on wastelands tiles.

cards.name: AshesOfGorgoroth
cards.quote: From the ashes rises a pulse of corruption, a blight upon the living.
cards.actionEffect: Ash and shadow pulse outward from the tower. Enemies in radius 3 gain Despair <sprite name="despair">; allied dark characters lose Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: Black Gate Sortie
cards.quote: From the shadows of the gate, we shall strike like a thunderstorm.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Luglurak Dark Magic
cards.quote: Fear is a weapon sharper than any blade.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy characters in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.quote: In the veil of shadows, our secrets shall remain hidden.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Shroud of Gorgoroth
cards.quote: Darkness enfolds the land, swallowing light and hope alike.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: The Blow of Gorgoroth
cards.quote: A strike steeped in malice, leaving fear in its wake.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Struck by a Morgul Blade
cards.quote: A wound that festers, a touch of the dark arts.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply MorgulTouch (3 turns).

cards.name: Dagorlad
cards.quote: Where the shadows of war linger, the ghosts of past battles still whisper.

cards.name: TheNineRideAgain
cards.quote: Once more, the dark riders gallop forth, terror in their wake.
cards.actionEffect: All Nazgul gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (3 turns).

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.quote: Fear lurks in shadows, where the unseen blade strikes true.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns) and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Black Númenórean Guard
cards.quote: They knew the towers of Westernesse and turned their backs on every light that once shone there.

cards.name: Mordor Wolf-riders
cards.quote: Saddle a warg and you have doubled your cruelty without halving your speed.

cards.name: Morannon Garrison
cards.quote: Nothing passes the Black Gate that the Eye has not already named and numbered.

cards.name: Nurn Reavers
cards.quote: The plains of Nurn remember no harvest but war; its people have grown to suit the yield.

cards.name: Khamul
cards.quote: The night is my ally, and fear is my weapon.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.
